subject: feat(ui): fix dark mode, add alpha badge, tutorial modal, burger menu
body:
Fix dark mode by replacing hardcoded Colors.light.tint with
useColorScheme-aware theme tokens for header background, text, and icons.
Add teal ALPHA badge next to "FuelHunt" title in header.
Replace cog icon with burger menu containing: How to Use (tutorial),
User Guide, Testing Guide, Source Code, and Admin links.
Add multi-step tutorial modal that auto-shows on first launch and
is re-accessible from the burger menu.

Tags: ui, dark-mode, tutorial, menu, header
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ux-polish
Semver: minor
